creator: alucryd@archlinux.org
text:
Hi all,

I have in fact another proposal, I will push this custom ffmpeg to Arch Linux in the future, and absolutely need to build it from source, so the source code will not just be available upon request but publicly available.

I would like to build this custom ffmpeg in the FreeBSD port too, this way it will always be rebuilt against the binary system libraries and we won't face this issue anymore. I really don't want to duplicate the effort you've all spent building and patching the libraries we need by bundling all of them.

@Ben Thanks for the feedback, I will change the maintainer email address to mine with the next update.
